name: Pesto Potatoes
recipeIngredient: 2 cups basil leaves (fresh or 1/2 cup dry)
2 pounds new potatoes, cooked and sliced
recipeInstructions:
1. Using a steel blade process in a food processor, mince the garlic.
2. Add Parmesan cheese and process until finely minced.
3. Add basil, nuts, and salt and process until finely minced.
4. With machine running, add oil in a steady stream.
5. Toss with sliced potatoes.
6. Serve warm or at room temperature.
